mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warning_record ( reagent_id, reagent_name, reagent_batch, warning_type, trigger_time, status ) VALUES ( #{reagentId}, #{reagentName}, #{reagentBatch}, #{warningType}, NOW(), #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, reagent_id, reagent_name, reagent_batch, warning_type, trigger_time, status, resolve_time, resolved_by FROM warning_record WHERE reagent_id = #{reagentId} AND warning_type = #{warningType} AND status = #{status} LIMIT 1
